item.title: The DARK HISTORY of Birth Contro
item.description: Georgia Marie explores the history of birth control in a concise, factual look at how it developed over time.

media:content.media:description: Georgia Marie explores the history of birth control in a concise, factual look at how it developed over time.

item.title: Abduction WITNESSED Through Telescope
item.description: A brief look at a reported witness account involving a telescope and Heather Teague.

item.title: Why the Menendez Case Divided a Nation
item.description: Georgia Marie explores why the Menendez case sparked widespread debate and divided public opinion.

item.title: The Disturbing Truth Behind Grégory’s Villemin Tragedy
item.description: Georgia Marie explores the background of the Grégory Villemin case in a concise, factual look at the tragedy.
